name: Blueberry Cornmeal Loaf Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss blueberries with 1 tablespoon flour and set aside.
2. Stir together the remaining flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and salt in a mixing bowl.
3. Combine yogurt and lemon juice in another small bowl.
4. Whisk together 2/3 cup sugar, oil, and lemon zest in a medium mixing bowl. Beat in whole egg, then egg white, beating well after each addition.
5. Alternately add dry ingredients and yogurt mixture, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
6. Gently fold in blueberries. Spoon batter into a lightly oiled 8-inch x 4-inch loaf pan.
7. Combine the remaining 2 teaspoons sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl and sprinkle over batter.
8. Bake on the center rack at 350°F for 25 minutes, then loosely cover the pan with aluminum foil. Continue baking until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean (50-60 total baking time).
9. Cool cake in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a rack and cool completely. (For best flavor, wrap the cake and store overnight before serving.) Makes 10 servings.
